sutta: monks these 9 persons are venerable worthy of honor worthy of gifts worthy of salutations the world's unsurpassed field for making merit the arahant he who has entered on the path to arahantship the anagamin or non-returner he was entered on the path to the realization of the fruit of the non-returner the sakata gaming of 1's returner he was entered on the path to the realization of the fruit of the once the sotapanna of stream winner he was entered on the path to the realization of the fruit of the stream winner and he who has become 1 of the clan godrabu monks these 9 persons are vulnerable worthy of honor worthy of gifts worthy of salutations the world's unsurpassed feel for making merit that's the end of the sutta
commentary: what is interesting about this uttar is that it mentions the 8 aryans plus a person called the gotra gotra now according to the command commentary the boo is 1 endowed with exceedingly powerful insight and thought with immediate prospects of attaining to the state of the stream winner and the way which means that the gotra boom of 1 of the clan is not an aryan he's not an aryan but he's very close to becoming a stream winner he he is fam fairly familiar with the sutas so even that type of person is considered vulnerable worthy of honor worthy of gifts worthy of salutations the world's unsurpassed feel for merit for making merit so these are the 9 persons who are described as such the next bhutan is
